description: Composition Grey T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, round neck, graphic print on the front, and a vented hem Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash cold Do not tumble dry Turn inside out and dry in shade Warm iron, but do not iron on print/embroidery Enliven your range of casual wear with this T-shirt from belmonte. In a subtle colour and bright branding on the chest, this soft cotton T-shirt guarantees effortless style for every casual occasion. Team this with jeans or bermudas for a failsafe weekend look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
